Highlights and Goals Japan 1 - 1 Sweden in 2026 FIFA World Cup | 06/25/2026
Highlights and Goals Japan 1 - 1 Sweden in 2026 FIFA World Cup
Japan and Sweden played out a 1-1 draw in a hard-fought contest decided by fine margins. Japan miss the chance to secure top spot, while Sweden earn a valuable point after a dramatic finish.
